shots.description: Wide shot: straw hat pirate stands at the bow in a storm.
shots.video_prompt: Fixed camera, wide shot. A straw hat pirate stands at the ship's bow, storm raging, lightning in the background, dramatic cinematic lighting, game-quality render.

shots.description: Close-up: pirate charges his rubber gear attack.
shots.video_prompt: Close-up. A rubber-powered pirate's fist glows red with energy, gear second steam rising, dramatic slow motion, particle effects, AAA game visual style.

shots.description: Wide shot: massive punch shatters the enemy ship's mast.
shots.video_prompt: Wide shot. A powerful fist slams into a wooden ship mast, the mast exploding in splinters, shockwave ripples outward, slow motion, cinematic game CG.
